entry.title: Loving Machine
entry.summary:
Author: Spenc56623

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,416Chapters: 8/8Kudos: 41

Summary: After a long night of work, getting home and finally relaxing, the one and only Red Hood falls into your apartment. Thinking it is his safe house, he is confused why you're here but when you notice him bleeding, your nurse instincts take over. Ignoring your fear, you patch him up. He leaves with A promise, threat, or warning, maybe even all three, that he will be back at some point in time.

entry.title: Needles don't scare me
entry.summary:
Author: darkdustyblue

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,115Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 4

Summary: Jason is studying Philosophy in Literature, Siena is a Criminal Justice major. Both have family trauma, both hate life, both decide to become friends. Jason is struggling with his mental health and navigating his first civilian friendship. Siena is disowned, moved from Italy to Gotham on a whim. She is a Robin die hard fan. Jason has a complicated relationship with his family. They both need someone to lean on and help them carry their respective burdens. Not technically Reader as it's a character but can be read as self insert due to limited and easy to skip character descriptions.

entry.title: Outsiders Inspired Batboys: Jason Todd x Chubby! Reader x Tim Drake
entry.summary:
Author: River_Shayde

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 32,206Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 20

Summary: Ever wonder what would happen if Dick had to raise Jason, Tim, and Damian during the 1960s in Gotham? What if they all met a once privileged girl who lost everything and now has to acclimate life in the greaser side of town? How will they all interact and face the villains, socs, and family issues that make up their daily life?Reader turns 18 a few days after meeting the family, and this will mainly be a Jason and Tim love story. There are two separate endings. Setting inspired by Grease and the Outsiders.

entry.title: The House hunger built
entry.summary:
Author: FearTheHime

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 99,322Chapters: 18/?Kudos: 565

Summary: "Of course I eat people, I mean...It's not something I would broadcast since it's...well Gotham and they began to make a phad about it because the citizens are brilliantly...stupid."Bodies are piling up, whatever is left. Families; different backgrounds, different ethnics, religions, looks are being eaten and whatever is left into a master piece. Some sort of art with the remains and everyone was losing time and leads to find out who has been feasting upon Gotham citizens. Jason however, knew of a Cannibal that he totally never mentioned to Bruce. It's not Jason's fault he died before revealing his darkest discovery and that discovery is in the form of a boy he had left behind. [M/N] [L/N]; Mortitan, brilliant, a chef of his own making and conisear of flesh.All Jason needed to do is sweeten the deal in a way that drives all people, after all at the end of the day {M/N] is human after all."Besides..it's people...they are literally born every day..so who cares if a few of them...just disapear once in a while?"

entry.title: This is what it feels like (to have your heart cracked in two)
entry.summary:
Author: thenyoumightaswellwrestleangels

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,736Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 20

Summary: "Why'd you invite me here?" Jason asks. "Hm?" "Because," you start, and your voice is so small that you're not sure it's yours anymore. It sounds a bit like a child's - like the you who used to know the man in front of you. "I'm selfish." "Selfish?" he echoes. "You… know me," you say quietly. "And I just… wanted to be around someone who… really knows me."

entry.title: Come as a Lover, Come as an Exeuctioner
entry.summary:
Author: dalgikiss

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 73,762Chapters: 51/54Kudos: 372

Summary: [Jason Todd x fem!spoiled!girly!civilian!reader] you are a ghost as i am a ghost, but i am banging cabinets and tv static and all you’ve ever been is silent // in which Bruce's spoiled daughter is loved beyond measure and jason is unsure where he fits in a world that she isn't allowed to know exists. But he's has never been good at walking away from things that could break him.

entry.title: Hammering Out A Family
entry.summary:
Author: DealMeFic

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,400Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 42

Summary: Jason Todd knows how to fight.He does not know how to build a crib without supervision.Between pride, panic, and the crushing fear of messing it all up, Jason navigates his girlfriends pregnancy, apartment hunting, family tension, and the slow, terrifying hope of becoming someone’s dad.Featuring: Tim being the one to supervise Jason of baby furniture assembly.

entry.title: Getting Around Gotham, or: Five Drabble Trysts with Batfam Men, and One 3500 Word Epilogue About How You All Realized It
entry.summary:
Author: gone (relocation)

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 500Chapters: 5/6Kudos: 23

Summary: A fresh arrival in Gotham and trying to meet new people, you find yourself entangled with five different men, unaware that they are all connected, just as they are unaware of each other's connection to you, until you all end up at one party. (In your defence, they all had different surnames.) - Updating Mondays and Fridays- Inspired by every time I've thought "What if someone dated everyone in the Batfam, and never realized it because they all have different surnames?"- Written for the characters in general, most recently (but certainly not only) influenced by WFA- Only Jason got outright smut, sorry Dick et al.- Drabbles can pretty much be enjoyed separately, but they are meant to be read together with the longer epilogue.- Titled edited. Originally 3300 word epilogue but decide to go for a 3500 for a nice clean 4k total.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: futile devices
entry.summary:
Author: al_lion_e

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 23,428Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 126

Summary: “That’s gonna get infected.” Comes a voice from down the alley, cold and disinterested. You freeze, and look up. “Oh.” “I mean,” says a man in a recognizable red helmet, “unless you disinfect it. Gothams dumpsters carry germs scientists haven’t even discovered.” He's leaning against the brick wall to your right near the entrance of the alley, his broad, intimidating figure literally blotting out the lights beyond. It's strange to see him so close up- in person, not in blurry photographs in magazines, or on the news.   Or: Encounters.

entry.title: The Bloom Knot
entry.summary:
Author: nocteris

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 47,094Chapters: 12/22Kudos: 136

Summary: Getting a soulmate was the last thing Jason needed as a young academic getting his PhD. Getting a soulmate was the last thing on your mind as a freshman.But one accidental shove and a falling pitcher of orange juice later, suddenly the both of you are soul bound to someone you’ve just met.Suddenly, you’re everywhere. In his classroom, in his notifications, in every line he reads. Suddenly, he’s everywhere. In the hallways, in the hum of your guitar strings, in the equations you solve.But seeing the others— Dick and Kory, Bruce and Selina, Damian and Jon— they all got to choose their soulmates.So in the eyes of fate, where did that leave the two of you?

entry.title: The Star that Wouldn't Die
entry.summary:
Author: ShadDork

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 82,247Chapters: 20/29Kudos: 561

Summary: Jason Todd forgot a lot of things after the lazarus pit's putrid green waters helped restore him back to life. Most of it was unimportant information, things that he didn't need to worry about, after all, he could always relearn names, smells, and re-read books. Lost memories weren't as easy to deal with the loss of, but he could always make new ones. The memories that remained were largely traumatic, and the others were slowly being uncovered as time passed. He wished that Dick hadn't said that name, your name. Reigniting feelings and memories. Guilt was already a large part of his existence, and this new guilt about forgetting you entirely was just making everything worse. He shouldn't track you down in case it accidentally put you in danger. But he wanted to make sure that you were okay. It was a battle he lost against himself. As memories he thought were long lost start to return, can he continue to be in your life without dragging you down with him? Can he be in your life without you knowing who he is? He doesn't know, but he wants to try.
